children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Extract and validate the command field from the input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON to extract the 'command' field and validate it is one of the allowed commands (send, history, create_channel, join). Return the command and remaining payload.
postconditions: Command is one of the allowed values
guarantees: Returns error if command is missing or invalid

outputs.name: payload
outputs.description: Remaining JSON fields after command extraction

constraints.description: Command must be one of: send, history, create_channel, join

acceptance_criteria.description: Valid JSON with command field returns command and payload

children.name: SendMessage
children.purpose: Handle sending a message to a channel
children.behavior: Validate that the user is a member of the specified channel, then store the message in the messages data store with timestamp and user info.
preconditions: User is member of the channel
postconditions: Message is stored in messages data store
guarantees: Returns error if user not in channel

call_inputs.name: payload
call_inputs.description: Contains channel, user, and message content

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check if user is a member of the channel
Store the new message with timestamp and user info

data_operations.description: Check if user is a member of the channel
Store the new message with timestamp and user info

constraints.description: User must be a member of the channel to send messages

acceptance_criteria.description: Message stored when user is member
Error returned when user not in channel

children.name: GetHistory
children.purpose: Retrieve message history for a channel
children.behavior: Validate that the user is a member of the channel, then fetch the last 100 messages from the messages data store for that channel, ordered by timestamp.
preconditions: User is member of the channel
guarantees: Returns error if user not in channel

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check if user is a member of the channel
Fetch last 100 messages for the channel

global_vars.description: Fetch last 100 messages for the channel

data_operations.description: Check if user is a member of the channel
Fetch last 100 messages for the channel

constraints.description: User must be a member of the channel to view history

acceptance_criteria.description: Messages returned when user is member
Error returned when user not in channel

children.name: CreateChannel
children.behavior: Check that the channel name does not already exist, then create a new channel entry in the channels data store with the creator as the first member.
preconditions: Channel name does not already exist
postconditions: Channel is created and creator is added as member
guarantees: Returns error if channel already exists

call_inputs.name: payload
call_inputs.description: Contains channel name and creator user

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and create new channel entry

global_vars.description: Check uniqueness and create new channel entry

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and create new channel entry

acceptance_criteria.description: Channel created when name is unique
Error returned when channel already exists

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Add a user to an existing channel
children.behavior: Check that the channel exists and the user is not already a member, then add the user to the channel's member list in the channels data store.
preconditions: User is not already a member
postconditions: User is added to channel's member list
guarantees: Returns error if channel does not exist or user already member

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check existence and membership, then update member list

global_vars.description: Check existence and membership, then update member list

data_operations.description: Check existence and membership, then update member list

constraints.description: User must not already be a member

acceptance_criteria.description: User added to channel when channel exists and user not already member
Error returned when channel does not exist
Error returned when user already member

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. ParseCommand has no data store access (pure function). SendMessage, GetHistory, CreateChannel, and JoinChannel have internal_leaf_accesses that map directly to global_vars and data_operations. No global_vars or data_operations are added beyond what internal_leaf_accesses specify. Constraints and acceptance criteria are derived from preconditions/postconditions/guarantees. Requested capabilities follow the resource.operation pattern from internal_leaf_accesses.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures are unchanged from Stage 2. ParseCommand: def ParseCommand(input: Any) -> tuple[str, dict]. SendMessage: def SendMessage(payload: dict) -> dict. GetHistory: def GetHistory(payload: dict) -> dict. CreateChannel: def CreateChannel(payload: dict) -> dict. JoinChannel: def JoinChannel(payload: dict) -> dict.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: SendMessage internal_leaf_accesses: channels.read -> global_vars[channels.read], data_operations[channels.read]; messages.write -> global_vars[messages.write], data_operations[messages.write]. GetHistory internal_leaf_accesses: channels.read -> global_vars[channels.read], data_operations[channels.read]; messages.read -> global_vars[messages.read], data_operations[messages.read]. CreateChannel internal_leaf_accesses: channels.read_write -> global_vars[channels.read_write], data_operations[channels.read_write]. JoinChannel internal_leaf_accesses: channels.read_write -> global_vars[channels.read_write], data_operations[channels.read_write]. ParseCommand has no internal_leaf_accesses, so global_vars and data_operations are empty.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child with internal_leaf_accesses, every resource/op pair appears exactly once in global_vars and once in data_operations. ParseCommand has no accesses, so both are empty. No exceptions needed.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All data stores (channels, messages) referenced in internal_leaf_accesses are covered. channels is used by SendMessage (read), GetHistory (read), CreateChannel (read_write), JoinChannel (read_write). messages is used by SendMessage (write), GetHistory (read). No data store is accessed without being declared.
